label: Looping
pattern: Agent reruns the same failing command without reading the assertion, stderr, or source file.
detectionRule: Same TEST command exits non-zero twice, with no intervening READ_FILE or SEARCH event.
recommendedHarnessChange: After the same command fails twice, force evidence gathering: inspect stderr, inspect failing test, ask for help, or switch policy.

label: Hallucinated file
pattern: Agent references a plausible source path that does not exist in the repository snapshot.
detectionRule: Any referenced file path is absent from known_files unless event action_type is BLOCKED_ACTION.
recommendedHarnessChange: Require search or file-existence check before referencing or editing a path.
